title: Add Your Next Chapter Here
summary: Template chapter. Replace this with your next draft.
content:
Paste your next chapter here.

To add more:
1. Create maelstory/chap3.json.
2. Add "chap3.json" to maelstory/manifest.json.
3. Commit to GitHub.
4. Open the site and press Refresh JSON.

The reader will load the new chapter automatically from the manifest.
